final_answer: To modify the pending boots order as Fatima Johnson (zip 78712), contact the retailer's customer service and provide only the minimum needed to locate the order — last name Johnson and zip code 78712 (or the order number if available). Request two things: (1) change the size to 8, and (2) confirm what material the boots are made of. Decline any requests for additional personal details beyond what is strictly required to pull up the order. Do not volunteer information about waterproofing preference or other personal details.
